intended_use: Lightning Viewer is intended to review and navigate diagnostic images. The viewer includes tools to aid in visualizing a region of interest.
intended_use_full: Lightning Viewer is intended to review and navigate diagnostic images. The viewer includes tools to aid in visualizing a region of interest.
ground_truth: Phantom study dataset with known voxel dimensions.
other_metrics: Measurement accuracy demonstrated through phantom study using dataset with known voxel dimensions for distance and angle calculations.
